name: full-team
description: Meta-plugin that coordinates every Solo Suite role, verifies that all 17 component plugins are available, and runs profile-aware full-team delivery with evidence-based gates.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate all Solo Suite engineering roles
interface.longDescription: Meta-plugin that coordinates every Solo Suite role, verifies that all 17 component plugins are available, and runs profile-aware full-team delivery with evidence-based gates. This Codex-native edition packages explicit workflows as skills, records sensitive actions as explicit-only, and uses portable installed-skill paths.
defaultPrompt: Use Solo Suite Full Team to help with this project.
